Propiedad.title: Propiedad
Propiedad.description: Represents a rental property managed by the application, including its address and owner information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Propiedad entity.

nombre.description: A descriptive name or reference for the property (e.g., 'Edificio Centro', 'Casa Frentista').

direccion.description: The street address of the property (e.g., 'Sarmiento 299').

dpto.description: Apartment or unit number, or a dash '-' if it's a house without units (e.g., 'PB A').

dueno.description: The full name of the property owner (e.g., 'Roberto Gómez').

Inquilino.title: Inquilino
Inquilino.description: Represents a tenant renting a specific property, including contact and contract details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Inquilino entity.

nombre.description: The full name of the tenant.

propiedadId.description: Reference to the Propiedad entity that this tenant is renting. (Relationship: Propiedad 1:N Inquilino)

telefono.description: The contact phone number of the tenant.

vencimiento.description: The contract expiration date for the tenant in 'DD/MM/AAAA' format.

estado.description: The current payment status of the tenant's rent.

tieneContrato.description: A flag indicating whether a contract file for this tenant has been uploaded.

Factura.title: Factura
Factura.description: Represents a bill or service invoice related to properties, such as utilities or communal expenses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Factura entity.

propiedadId.description: Reference to the Propiedad entity this invoice is associated with. Optional if the invoice is for general administration. (Relationship: Propiedad 1:N Factura)

concepto.description: A brief description of the invoice's concept (e.g., 'Luz (Edenor) - Espacios Comunes').

importe.description: The monetary amount of the invoice, including currency symbol (e.g., '$ 45.000').

vencimiento.description: The due date for the invoice payment in 'DD/MM/AAAA' format.

estado.description: The current payment status of the invoice.

tieneArchivo.description: A flag indicating whether an associated receipt or document has been uploaded for this invoice.

Mantenimiento.title: Mantenimiento
Mantenimiento.description: Represents a maintenance task or repair record for a property, including costs and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Mantenimiento entity.

propiedadId.description: Reference to the Propiedad entity where the maintenance was performed. (Relationship: Propiedad 1:N Mantenimiento)

concepto.description: A description of the maintenance task or repair (e.g., 'Plomería - Reparación caño PB').

importe.description: The cost of the maintenance, including currency symbol (e.g., '$ 85.000').

vencimiento.description: The due date for payment or expected completion date of the maintenance task in 'DD/MM/AAAA' format.

estado.description: The current status of the maintenance task.

tieneArchivo.description: A flag indicating whether an associated document (e.g., invoice, photo) has been uploaded for this maintenance record.

RentalApplication.title: RentalApplication
RentalApplication.description: Represents a rental application submitted by a potential tenant.

definition.description: Collection storing individual rental property details.
Collection for recording bills and service invoices.
Collection for storing rental applications submitted by potential tenants.
